'''Khlor''' was a highly skilled [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who specialized in live capture and tracking. Adorned in dark clothes and a full-body cloak, and with a jet-black [[Velusian fursnake]] named [[Sting]] coiled around his neck and shoulders, he presented a harrowing image to client and prey alike.

He specialized in nonlethal weaponry, employing [[Stun grenade/Legends|stun grenades]], [[magna bolas]], [[RGL-80 electronet grenade|electro-nets]], [[Blowgun/Legends|blowguns]], and a modified [[R-88 Suppressor riot rifle/Legends|R-88 suppressor riot rifle]] to capture his marks alive. He piloted a modified scout ship, [[Predator (scout ship)|''Predator'']], and maintained a [[Khlor's hideout|base]] on [[Velusia/Legends|Velusia]] which he kept stocked with deadly predators and poisonous organisms—and the occasional freelance merc, kidnapped and let loose on the island to provide Khlor with a little practice between jobs.<ref name="CatCW" />
